testingNotice.title: Welcome to Airalogy!
testingNotice.message: This site is in public testing. You may encounter a few bugs or inconveniences while we continue to improve the platform. Thank you for your understanding— the Airalogy team is working hard to make everything better!
testingNotice.helper: You can now start exploring all the features Airalogy has to offer.

formOverlay.description: This feature is currently undergoing pre-launch testing and will be available soon.

about.title: About
about.introduction: Airalogy: The world's first universal platform for research digitization, automation, and acceleration

home.pinnedLimitReached: You can pin up to {count} items.
home.pinnedEmptyDesc: Pin labs, projects, or protocols from the sidebar for quick access.

start.title: Get your first research workflow running
start.description: Create or choose a project, add a reusable protocol, then record the first run.

workspace.title: 1. Choose a workspace
workspace.description: Use a lab and project to keep people, permissions, and research context together.

protocol.title: 2. Add a protocol
protocol.description: Start from a template, reuse one from Hub, or upload an existing protocol package.

record.title: 3. Add a record
record.description: Fill the protocol once to produce a structured record and report.

empty.title: Welcome, {name}
empty.description: Start with a lab or explore shared protocols before creating your own workflow.

recordDiary.heatmapHint: View yearly submission activity and click a day to inspect its records
recordDiary.calendarHint: Browse records by month; click a day to filter records and click an event to open its report
recordDiary.calendarTruncated: This calendar range has many records. Showing the first {count}.

tab.membersHint: Project collaborators are scoped to this project; changes here won't affect access to other projects in this lab.

protocolsEmpty.title: Add the first protocol to this project
protocolsEmpty.description: A protocol is the reusable form or workflow that turns a project into recordable research work.

project.title: Project
project.description: Keeps the research topic, members, and permissions together.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.description: Defines what should be collected, checked, and reused.

record.title: Record
record.description: Stores one completed run with structured values and files.

protocolFolders.helperHint: Folders organize protocols inside this project. Use subprojects when you need separate members, permissions, or settings.
protocolFolders.manageHint: Deleting a folder does not delete protocols. They stay in this project and become uncategorized.
protocolFolders.manageProtocolsHint: Select which protocols belong to this folder. Removing a protocol here only removes it from this folder.
protocolFolders.noProtocols: No protocols in this project yet
protocolFolders.deleteDescription: Delete folder "{name}"? Protocols will stay in this project and become uncategorized.

settingsPage.generalDescription: Manage your project's basic information and preferences

records.searchContentPlaceholder: Search record content to see whether a term was mentioned

records.deleteBlockedLatest: There is a newer record. Please delete the latest record first.

records.deleteBlockedLoading: Fetching latest record info. Please try again later.
records.deleteAdminWarning: This record is beyond the {days}-day safety window. Records past this window should generally not be deleted. You are deleting as an owner/manager, so even if you can delete, please proceed with caution.

tab.membersHint: Members are individual users who can access this lab. Add members to grant access and manage their roles.
tab.groupsHint: Groups let you bundle multiple people and grant a whole group access to multiple projects, making access management easier.

settingsPage.generalDescription: Manage your lab's basic information and preferences
settingsPage.logoHint: Upload a logo for your lab. Recommended size: 200x200px
settingsPage.labIdHint: Lab ID is created and cannot be changed.
settingsPage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your lab and its purpose
settingsPage.deleteDescription: Once the lab is deleted, all data will be permanently erased and cannot be recovered. Please proceed with caution.
settingsPage.deleteBlockedHint: Only labs without project data can be deleted directly. Resolve the following items before deleting this lab.
settingsPage.deleteReadyHint: This lab has no projects. Deletion cannot be undone.
settingsPage.deleteReadyWithDefaultProjectsHint: Only {count} default projects remain. They will be cleaned up automatically when the lab is deleted.
settingsPage.deleteBlockedProjects: {count} projects still need to be removed
settingsPage.deleteBlockedUsers: {count} members are still in this lab. Their lab memberships will be removed together with the lab.
settingsPage.deleteBlockedDefaultProjectProtocols: {count} protocol records still exist in the default projects and must be cleared first
settingsPage.deleteModalWarning: This permanently removes the lab and its lab-level configuration.
settingsPage.deleteErrorHasProjects: This lab still contains projects. Remove or migrate every project before deleting the lab.
settingsPage.deleteErrorHasUsers: Failed to clean up lab memberships while deleting the lab. Please try again.
settingsPage.deleteErrorDefaultProjectsHaveProtocols: The default projects still contain protocol data. Clear those protocols before deleting the lab.
settingsPage.deleteErrorForbidden: Only the lab owner can delete this lab.
settingsPage.deleteError: Failed to delete lab. Please try again.
settingsPage.forceDeleteDescription: Owner only. This removes projects, protocols, records, and file objects under the lab in a cascading flow and carries a high risk.
settingsPage.forceDeleteOwnerHint: This option is only shown when normal deletion is blocked by existing data. You will see the impact summary first and must enter the exact lab ID to continue.
settingsPage.forceDeletePreviewDescription: Review the impact below before continuing. The deletion runs asynchronously in the background and cannot be undone.
settingsPage.forceDeleteUidLabel: Enter the lab ID to confirm
settingsPage.forceDeleteCheckbox: I understand this will permanently delete the lab and all related data under it, and that the action cannot be undone.
settingsPage.forceDeleteFinalWarning: Force delete bypasses the normal conservative deletion guardrails and attempts to remove projects, protocols, records, memberships, and file objects directly.
settingsPage.forceDeleteInProgressDescription: A force delete job is already running in the background. Do not submit another one.
settingsPage.forceDeleteStarted: The force delete job has been submitted and is now running in the background.
settingsPage.forceDeleteSuccess: The lab force delete has completed.
settingsPage.forceDeletePreviewError: Failed to load the force delete impact summary. Please try again.
settingsPage.forceDeleteStatusError: Failed to load the force delete job status. Please try again later.
settingsPage.forceDeleteErrorForbidden: Only the lab owner can force delete this lab.
settingsPage.forceDeleteErrorUidMismatch: The entered lab ID does not match. Please confirm and try again.
settingsPage.forceDeleteErrorIrreversibleRequired: You must confirm that the action is irreversible before continuing.
settingsPage.forceDeleteErrorAlreadyInProgress: A force delete job is already running for this lab. Do not submit another one.
settingsPage.forceDeleteErrorJobNotFound: The requested force delete job could not be found.
settingsPage.forceDeleteError: Failed to start the lab force delete. Please try again.
settingsPage.noChangesDescription: Lab information has not been modified.
settingsPage.updateError: Failed to update lab information. Please try again.

project.owner: Designate any user as a Manager, and manage all Protocols and Records.
project.manager: Assign any role below Manager, and manage all Protocols and Records.
project.collaborator: Create new Protocols and view all Protocols and Records.
project.recorder: In private projects, can create or reuse Protocols, submit Records, and view all Protocols, but can only view their own Records.
project.recorderPublic: In public projects, can open the data-entry interface, submit Records, and view public Protocols and Records.
project.recorderSelfOnly: Can only submit & view their own records.
project.explorer: Access the data-entry interface for public Protocol.
project.explorerSelfOnly: Can run and experiment, but can only see their own temporary data.
project.viewerSelfOnly: Pure static reader: can only view the public Protocol, but cannot see any records.

lab.owner: Designate any user as a Manager, and manage all Groups and Projects.
lab.manager: Assign any role below Manager, and manage all Groups and Projects.
lab.member: Create new Projects and view all Public Projects and Protocols.

viewer.previewPublicProtocols: Preview public Protocols created by others

manager.assignRole: Assign any role other than manager

chat.airaIntroTitle: Hi, I'm Aira, your AI research copilot

hub.nanotechnology: Recommend protocols in the field of nanotechnology.
